seo.title: Power 90 Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Burn fat and build muscle with Power 90. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Tony has revolutionized the fitness world by helping millions of people get ripped and get healthy with his total-body workouts. He’s collaborated with BODi on some of our biggest programs, pushing people all over the world to work towards their own extreme body transformations.

data.descriptionShort: Power 90 is packed with fun simple workouts that get results.
data.descriptionLong: Tony Horton’s secret is his exclusive sectional progression training method. You’ll burn and build lean, strong muscles faster than you’ve ever seen, and get a total body workout in just 30-minutes.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells or Resistance Bands, Sturdy Chair, Yoga Mat*, Push-Up Stands*
modules.categories: Cardio, Strength, Muscle Building, Core, Slim & Sculpt, Bootcamp, Bodyweight Training, Weight Loss, Yoga

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

T405szsSamzin6dj7R7Orp.title: Core Cardio
T405szsSamzin6dj7R7Orp.descriptionLong: Strengthen your core muscles, tighten your abs, and burn fat all at the same time. Core Cardio is the perfect mix of cardio combined with Tony’s most innovative ab and core moves ever! Get ready for a ripped midsection and a lean, toned body. This breakthrough new workout is fun and energizing, plus it improves balance, coordination and endurance while delivering you the results you’ve been after!

TLO8WWQ85YuM6DeBHIjAXW.title: Sweat 5-6
TLO8WWQ85YuM6DeBHIjAXW.descriptionLong: This big-time, calorie-burning workout picks up where Power 90’s Sweat 3-4 left off. If you’re ready to raise the bar on your cardio, you’re ready for Sweat 5-6. Keep burning fat and calories and get the lean, ripped body you’ve been after!

TLO8WWQ85YuM6DeBHIjDG9.title: Cardio Intervals
TLO8WWQ85YuM6DeBHIjDG9.descriptionLong: This advanced cardio workout uses interval training to challenge your body so you burn fat and calories in a shorter period of time. Tony takes you through a series of high-energy intervals that will strengthen your body and boost your energy. You’ll work your entire body with special targeted toning of your core, waist, hips, glutes, and thighs with this lively combination of exercises that offer beginning, intermediate, and “I can’t believe I’m doing it” levels.

o2pJdBS1SphrVUahQKZWLR.title: Plyo Legs
o2pJdBS1SphrVUahQKZWLR.descriptionLong: In Plyo Legs, Tony uses a combination of innovative plyometric moves that are guaranteed to strengthen, sculpt, and shape your legs, hips, and glutes. You’ll get a lean and ripped lower body you’ll want to show off, plus you’ll dramatically enhance your athletic performance. Tony puts you through an explosive yet energizing routine that’s fun, effective and delivers results!

trainers.bio: Tony has revolutionized the fitness world by helping millions of people get ripped and get healthy with his total-body workouts. He’s collaborated with BODi on some of our biggest programs, pushing people all over the world to work towards their own extreme body transformations.

o2pJdBS1SphrVUahQKZX4I.title: Sculpt 5-6
o2pJdBS1SphrVUahQKZX4I.descriptionLong: Sculpt 5-6 packs an assortment of Tony’s top body-sculpting exercises to strengthen, sculpt, and tone your entire body. Tony turns up the intensity with targeted moves that focus on those key muscles we all want to show off. So get ready to maximize your results and put the final touches on your lean, sexy physique.

trainers.bio: Tony has revolutionized the fitness world by helping millions of people get ripped and get healthy with his total-body workouts. He’s collaborated with BODi on some of our biggest programs, pushing people all over the world to work towards their own extreme body transformations.

o2pJdBS1SphrVUahQKZchA.title: UML (Upper Middle Lower)
o2pJdBS1SphrVUahQKZchA.descriptionLong: Tony continues to challenge your body with innovative moves. These new sequences deliver a ripped upper body, lower body and midsection-lifting your butt, trimming your tummy, and giving you arms you’ll want to show off. The fun, energetic pace eliminated monotonous repetition with targeted focus on stubborn areas to give you jaw-dropping results.
